description:
You are a technical writer assigned to double-check and document existing INI-style configuration files that live in a small project tree.  
Your goal is to create a single machine-readable report that collects every section name and every key=value pair found in all “*.ini” files under the directory “/home/user/docs/configs”.

Detailed requirements
1. Leave the original files untouched; only **read** them.
2. Create the directory “/home/user/docs/reports” (if it does not yet exist).
3. Inside that directory, create the file “config_summary.log”.  
   • It must be plain UTF-8 text.  
   • It must contain one block per INI file, and blocks must appear in **alphabetical order of the filename**.  
   • A block starts with a header line exactly in this form (no leading ‘./’ or absolute paths):  
     FILE: <filename>  (example: “FILE: database.ini”)  
   • Next, list every section in the order it appears inside that INI file.  
     For each section, output a single line:  
       [section_name] → key1=value1; key2=value2; ...  
     ‑ Use the literal arrow “→” (U+2192).  
     ‑ Preserve the original key ordering within the section.  
     ‑ Separate key/value pairs with “; ” (semicolon+space).  
   • After the last section of that file, add one blank line before the next FILE header (except after the very last file).  
   • Do not add any other text, timestamps, comments, or extra blank lines.

4. When you are done, print the whole contents of “config_summary.log” to STDOUT so that the grader can capture it easily.

Hints for tools you might find useful: grep, sed, awk, sort, printf, while-read loops, etc.  
The entire task should not require more than 5-10 shell commands.

Automatic tests will:
• Verify that “/home/user/docs/reports/config_summary.log” exists.  
• Verify the exact byte-for-byte contents described above.  
• Reject reports with missing, reordered, or extra information.
truth:
Existing project tree BEFORE the agent starts:

/home/user/docs/configs/settings.ini
------------------------------------------------
[general]
author=alice
version=1.2.3

[paths]
home=/home/alice
temp=/tmp/project

------------------------------------------------


/home/user/docs/configs/database.ini
------------------------------------------------
[connection]
host=localhost
port=5432
user=dbuser

[pools]
min=1
max=15

------------------------------------------------


/home/user/docs/configs/ui.ini
------------------------------------------------
[window]
width=1024
height=768

[theme]
color=dark
font=Roboto

------------------------------------------------


Target file that must be produced by the agent:

/home/user/docs/reports/config_summary.log
------------------------------------------------
FILE: database.ini
[connection] → host=localhost; port=5432; user=dbuser
[pools] → min=1; max=15

FILE: settings.ini
[general] → author=alice; version=1.2.3
[paths] → home=/home/alice; temp=/tmp/project

FILE: ui.ini
[window] → width=1024; height=768
[theme] → color=dark; font=Roboto
------------------------------------------------
